extortion.description: [AI generated] HGM Legal is a New Zealand-based law firm that specializes in technology and intellectual property law. The firm works with a range of clients including startups, established businesses, and public sector organizations. The services offered by the firm include legal advice in areas such as technology, intellectual property, commercial contracts, and cybersecurity. HGM Legal is known for integrating technology into their work process to better serve their clients. Their team includes a mix of lawyers and tech specialists with experience in a variety of sectors.
